ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: RecordType.Name = "Patient Engagement Opportunity" && ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Sales Qualified Opportunity") && (ISPICKVAL(LeadSource,"") || Lead_Source_Detail__c = "" || ISPICKVAL(Product_Line__c,"") || ISPICKVAL(Type,""))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: These fields are required: Lead Source, Lead Source Detail, Product Line, and Type.
